description: Google Analytics is Google's web and app analytics platform. The legacy Universal Analytics Reporting API associated with analyticsreporting.googleapis.com has been sunset, and Google now directs developers to GA4-era APIs and tooling.
summary: analyticsreporting.googleapis.com itself no longer exposes a current public integration surface; legacy Universal Analytics Reporting API v4 docs now return sunset notices. Related current Google Analytics integrations are the separate Analytics Data API, Admin API, and a local Python MCP server.
